name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.2.0: insert_equation latex parser delegated to latex-math-swift v0.1.0 — supports \frac \sqrt \hat \bar \tilde \left/\right \sum/\int/\prod (with bounds) \ln/\sin/\cos/etc \sup/\inf/\lim \text all Greek letters and common operators. 18/18 econometrics thesis fixture equations now parse where v3.1.0 returned 'unrecognized token' errors. Built on ooxml-swift 0.11.0 (MathAccent added). Closes #22.
